name: Super League Enterprise, Inc.
business: Super League Enterprise is an audience intelligence and media activation company that connects brands with consumers who play video games. The company generates revenue by executing advertising and marketing programs for brands and agencies, including mini-games, playable ads, in-game ads, and influencer content across gaming and digital platforms. As of fiscal year 2025, the company operates as a single reportable segment.

exposures.sentence: The Company generates revenue from brands and agencies by executing programs targeting U.S. audiences that include (i) mini-games and experiences within Roblox, Minecraft, and Fortnite, (ii) playable and rewarded video ads in mobile and immersive environments, (iii) in-game ads across mobile and PC, (iv) connected TV gaming applications and sponsorships, (v) custom integrations within games, (vi) interactive characters, and (vii) influencer content across social and digital video platforms.

catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we acquired Supersocial, an award-winning production studio and creative agency that has been a pioneer on the Roblox platform since its founding in 2020.
In May 2025, we expanded our partnership with AdArcade, creators of Native Playables, a patented mobile ad format that delivers three times higher engagement than other mobile playable ads.

In July 2025, we expanded our strategic commercial partnership with Meta-Stadiums Corp., a pioneer in mobile-first, gamified virtual entertainment and operator of AI-powered, next-generation creator networks.

In October 2025, we announced an exclusive sales partnership with ES3, a leading technology and media solutions company specializing in interactive content experiences for connected TV (CTV) and traditional Pay TV environments.
In January 2026 the Company acquired Let's Bounce, Inc. (Bounce), a marketing technology company focused on enabling scalable, measurable brand engagement inside gaming and UGC environments.

catalysts.event: Entry into Asset Purchase Agreement with Misfits
catalysts.sentence: On March 16, 2026, the Company, entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement (the Misfits Purchase Agreement) with Esports Now, LLC (Misfits), pursuant to which Misfits has agreed to sell certain assets strictly constituting the Misfits Ads Business.

tamClaims.claim: 3.3 billion global gaming population and $1.0 trillion global advertising market
tamClaims.sentence: Super League (Nasdaq: SLE) is an audience intelligence and media activation company operating at the intersection of a 3.3-billion-person global gaming population and a $1.0 trillion global advertising market.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. gaming advertising spend of $8.6 billion compared to $67.6 billion for television and $65.3 billion for social media
tamClaims.sentence: U.S. advertising expenditures total approximately $67.6 billion for television and $65.3 billion for social media, compared to approximately $8.6 billion for gaming (Source: eMarketer, 2022).
